name: Up Together
author: Poki
description: In Up Together, your goal is to jump all the way to the top! Pick your favorite fruit or vegetable, choose a nice name and set out for a parkour adventure. Step on blue blocks to gain a speed boost and jump extra far, but avoid the red blocks! The higher you get, the better your place on the leaderboard will be, so try to get as far as you can. And keep your eyes peeled, there might be some secrets hiding around... Do you have the parkour skill to get to the top of Up Together? How to play Up Together? Use WASD or the arrow keys to move around! Use Space to jump! Hold space to keep jumping or climb up walls! Who created Up Together Up Together is created by Iron Fox Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Up Together for free? You can play Up Together for free on Poki. Can I play Up Together on mobile devices and desktop? Up Together can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
